hero.badge: Link in bio + analytics for creators
hero.description: Create beautiful link pages for each creator and track exactly where clicks come from — OnlyFans, Privacy, Instagram and more, all in one dashboard.

features.title: Features
features.headline: Everything a creator needs in one bio
features.sub: Pages built to convert and tracking that proves what works — no spreadsheets, no guesswork.
features.card1Desc: Dark with neon, photo, verified badge, featured card, and previews. Mobile-first and loads in a flash.
features.card2Desc: Each button redirects to count the click. See OnlyFans, Privacy, Instagram, and more, side by side.
features.card3Desc: Manage dozens of creators in one account. Sparklines, top links, and page status at a glance.
features.card4Desc: Built on Next.js with optimized images and clean SEO. 100% Lighthouse score ready for traffic.
features.card5Desc: Accent colors per creator, custom bio, and own domain. The page is yours — no third-party branding.
features.card6Desc: Age verification badge, locked previews, and highlighted subscription cards. Ready to convert.
features.card7Desc: Accept payments in USD, BRL, EUR, GBP and more. Each creator charges in her audience's currency — no manual conversion, no lost sales.
features.card8Desc: The creator gets a professional page at amanda.com, not at /p/amanda. Custom domain with SSL included, set up in minutes.
features.card9Desc: Sell plans with Stripe (card), Pix, Auto-Pix, and crypto. Subscribers pay however they prefer — you receive it directly, no middleman.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.headline: From idea to first click in 3 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Type the creator's name. We generate the link and platform buttons automatically.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Adjust links, accent color, photo, and bio. Publish and the page goes live instantly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Share the link in bio. See clicks per day and per platform, in real time, in the dashboard.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.headline: Start free. Scale as you grow.
pricing.sub: No card to start. Cancel anytime.
pricing.freeFeature3: CreatorsLink branding on link-in-bio and bot
pricing.creatorFeature5: Easy fixed billing and high margin

faq.title: FAQ
faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. Pages come with an 18+ badge, locked previews, and a featured subscription card — built for premium content creators, respecting each platform's rules.
faq.a2: Each button on the page goes through a redirect link that records the click (creator + platform) and then sends the person to the real destination. It's instant and invisible to the visitor.
faq.a3: You connect your bot, create VIP plans (monthly, quarterly, annual) and the platform handles the rest: the subscriber pays by card, is added to your channel or group automatically and removed when the plan expires — all without leaving the dashboard.
faq.a4: Payouts are integrated: we accept card payments and subscription revenue is deposited directly to you, no extra billing tool needed. You track subscribers and revenue in the same dashboard as your clicks.
faq.q5: Do I need to know how to code?
faq.a5: No. You create a creator by name, adjust links and accent color from the dashboard, and publish. Zero lines of code.
faq.q6: Can I use my own domain?
faq.a6: Yes, starting from the Pro plan. Point your domain and pages live at yourdomain.com/p/name, with your branding and no third-party logos.
faq.a7: Yes. One account manages multiple pages, each with its own tracking. The Pro/Scale plan unlocks unlimited creators and team access.

cta.headline: Turn your bio into a real funnel
cta.sub: Create your first page in 60 seconds and watch the clicks roll in.

showcase.title: Tracking panel
showcase.headline: Know which platform actually brings money
showcase.description: Stop guessing. Every click is attributed to a creator and a platform, so you know where to invest time and traffic.
showcase.feat2Desc: 14-day series and variation vs. previous period.
showcase.feat3Desc: compare pages and discover each one's top link.

telegram.headline: Sell plans on Telegram without leaving the platform
telegram.description: Create VIP plans, connect your bot, and let us handle the rest: the subscriber pays, joins the channel, and you get paid — all integrated, no external tools.
telegram.feature1Desc: monthly, quarterly, and annual, created in minutes in the dashboard.
telegram.feature2Desc: Credit card via Stripe, one-time Pix, Auto-Pix (automatic debit on renewal), and crypto (USDT, BTC, ETH and more). Money goes straight to you — no middleman.
telegram.feature3Desc: subscribed, joins the channel; expired, removed. Fully automated setup.
telegram.feature4Desc: subscribers, revenue, and bio clicks together, under your own domain.
telegram.botWelcome: Hello! 💎 Choose your plan to join Babi's VIP Channel:
telegram.accessReleased: Access to the VIP Channel granted automatically. Welcome! 🎉

creators.title: Creators
creators.description: Manage link pages and track clicks for each creator.
creators.tableHeaderSub: Click on a creator to view tracking
creators.noCreators: No creators yet. Create your first page.
creators.dialogNewDesc: Create a link page and start tracking clicks.
creators.instruction1: In your provider's panel (buttons above), create a CNAME record:
creators.instruction1Detected: Open {detected} (button highlighted above) and create a CNAME record:
creators.instruction2: Wait for DNS propagation (can take up to 24h).
creators.instruction3: Save the domain above — the creator's page will start responding on her domain.
creators.connectDescription: Connect a payout account to sell VIP subscriptions. Money goes directly to the creator's account; the platform only retains the plan fee.
creators.noPlans: No VIP plans yet. Create the first one below.
creators.dialogPlanDesc: Configure the plan fans will see on the creator's page.
creators.titlePlaceholder: e.g. VIP Monthly, All Access, Weekly Pack

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Manage platforms available for link tracking.
platforms.dialogNewDesc: Fill in the details to create a new tracking platform.
platforms.fieldKeyHelp: Unique identifier. Cannot be changed after creation.
platforms.fieldBaseUrlHelp: Prefix used when generating the link (e.g. https://onlyfans.com/username).
platforms.alertDeleteDesc: The platform {label} will be permanently removed. Links of creators using this platform won't be affected, but the platform won't be available for new creators anymore.
